data.name: Tip_Add
data.value: Add a server that already exists in a folder

data.name: EmptyState
data.value: Select or add a server to get started.

data.name: Tip_ChangeIcon
data.value: Click to change the server icon (what players see)

data.name: Tunnel_Placeholder
data.value: Auto-detected, or paste the tunnel address here...

data.name: Tip_CreateTunnel
data.value: Create the Playit tunnel for this server (by its port)

data.name: Tip_Web
data.value: Open the Playit.gg panel to create or view tunnels

data.name: Tip_Service
data.value: Start/stop the Playit service (may require admin)

data.name: Command_Placeholder
data.value: Type a command (e.g. say hi, op Alex, stop) and press Enter...

data.name: Tip_Commands
data.value: See available commands and what they do

data.name: Players_ConnectedHint
data.value: Actions available when the server is running.

data.name: Whitelist_Hint
data.value: Only these players can join (if the whitelist is enabled in Configure).

data.name: RestartNeeded
data.value: The language will apply after restarting the app. Restart now?

data.name: Cs_UsePlayit
data.value: Use Playit.gg for this server (Internet tunnel)

data.name: Cs_AutoCreateTunnel
data.value: Automatically create the Playit.gg tunnel for this server

data.name: Cs_AutoStart
data.value: Start the server when done to generate the world and files

data.name: Cfg_HeaderFmt
data.value: Settings for "{0}". Changes apply when you (re)start the server.

data.name: Cfg_MotdDesc
data.value: The text players see under the server name in the Minecraft list. Supports color codes with § (e.g. §a green, §6 gold, §l bold).

data.name: Cfg_GamemodeDesc
data.value: Default mode for players who join: Survival (health/hunger), Creative (unlimited resources and flight), Adventure (can't break blocks) or Spectator.

data.name: Cfg_DifficultyDesc
data.value: How much damage enemies and hunger do. Peaceful spawns no monsters and doesn't drain hunger; Hard hits harder and you can even starve to death.

data.name: Cfg_MaxPlayersDesc
data.value: Maximum number of players connected at once. More players need more RAM and CPU.

data.name: Cfg_PvpDesc
data.value: If enabled, players can damage each other. Turn it off for a peaceful/cooperative server.

data.name: Cfg_HardcoreDesc
data.value: Extreme mode: difficulty locked to Hard and, on death, the player is permanently set to spectator. Use only for challenges.

data.name: Cfg_FlightDesc
data.value: In Survival, prevents the server from kicking players who fly (useful with mods/plugins that grant flight). Doesn't grant flight by itself.

data.name: Cfg_CmdBlocksDesc
data.value: Allows command blocks to create automatic mechanics (maps, minigames). Leave it off if you don't use them.

data.name: Cfg_SpawnProtDesc
data.value: Radius (in blocks) around spawn where normal players can't build or break. 0 disables it.

data.name: Cfg_ViewDistDesc
data.value: How far chunks are loaded and sent to players. Higher = see farther, but uses more CPU and network. Typical: 8–12.

data.name: Cfg_SimDistDesc
data.value: How far the server 'simulates' the world (mobs, crops, redstone). Higher = more active things at once, more CPU. Typical: 8–10.

data.name: Cfg_GenStructuresDesc
data.value: Whether villages, dungeons, temples, strongholds, etc. generate in the world. Almost always left on.

data.name: Cfg_PortDesc
data.value: Local port the server listens on. If you change it, remember the Playit tunnel must point to this same port.

data.name: Cfg_OnlineModeDesc
data.value: On: only legitimate Minecraft accounts can join (recommended and safe). Off ('cracked'): anyone can join, with no identity or skin verification.

data.name: Cfg_WhitelistDesc
data.value: If enabled, only players added to the whitelist can join. Ideal for private servers with friends.

data.name: Ae_JavaPlaceholder
data.value: java (uses the one in PATH) or path to java.exe

data.name: Del_ConfirmFmt
data.value: Remove the server "{0}" from the list?

data.name: Del_Tunnel
data.value: Also delete its Playit.gg tunnel (the one pointing to its port).

data.name: Del_Files
data.value: Also delete all server files on disk (including the world).

data.name: Del_Warning
data.value: The entire server folder will be permanently deleted. This action CANNOT be undone.

data.name: Pk_Intro
data.value: To create and delete tunnels automatically, the app needs a Playit key with write permission. The agent key you already have is read-only and won't work for this.

data.name: Pk_Steps
data.value: Generate a key in your playit.gg account (keys / API section, with write permission) and paste it here. It is stored only on your computer.

data.name: Signal_NoTunnel
data.value: On on your PC, but the Playit tunnel is off: nobody can join from the Internet.

data.name: Cs_PortNote
data.value: To run several servers at once, each must use a different port.
